{{Infobox artifact
| name = Syphren, the Whispering Death
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Syphren, the Whispering Death]] is an [[Awakened]] bronze weapon that [[Lucan]] named.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19">''Of Shadow and Sea'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Syphren]]'s blade looks like a glass window looking into a netherworld and is filled with dozens of shining green hands.<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|[[Syphren's power]] was increased by two kills performed by [[Shera]].<ref name="ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea-c19" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Shadow and Sea]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
